description:
## What
Add RSS/Atom feed autodiscovery links to the actor document (`url` field area) and to the WebFinger response JRD `links` array so feed readers can discover feeds automatically. Specifically: add `<link rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml">` entries in the WebFinger JRD links array.

## Why
Feed reader autodiscovery (following RFC 5988 / WebFinger JRD conventions) allows clients to find the feed without knowing the feed URL in advance, making smallhold personas fully discoverable by standard feed aggregators.

## Agent team pattern
- Spawn a Research subagent to: check mastodon.social WebFinger JRD response for a real user to see how it exposes alternate feed links; check ActivityPub actor document conventions for linking to feeds; review RFC 5988 link relation types for `alternate`
- Spawn an Implementation subagent to: modify WebFinger handler to include `{"rel": "http://schemas.google.com/g/2005#feed", "type": "application/atom+xml", "href": "https://domain/users/:username/feed.atom"}` and RSS equivalent in the JRD links array; update actor document serialization to include feed links if appropriate
- Spawn a Test subagent to: fetch WebFinger response for a test persona, assert feed link entries are present with correct rel, type, and href values; fetch actor document and assert feed links present

## Test discipline
- Independent oracle: mastodon.social live WebFinger JRD at /.well-known/webfinger?resource=acct:user@mastodon.social — observe the actual link entries returned and replicate those rel/type values
- Test approach: deserialize WebFinger JRD JSON in test, assert links array contains entries with type `application/rss+xml` and `application/atom+xml` pointing to correct persona-scoped URLs

## Defensive programming checklist
- No `.unwrap()` in handler paths
- Feed URLs in JRD must use the server's canonical domain from config — never hardcode
- WebFinger must still return correct JRD for non-feed resources; adding feed links must not break existing WebFinger behavior
title: Link RSS/Atom feeds from actor document and WebFinger autodiscovery
